description.value:
Frequency once per day

Trigger You would be reduced to 0 Hit Points but not immediately killed by a creature you're aware of.

You swear vengeance against the creature who almost brought you down, committing yourself to their destruction. You avoid being knocked out and remain at 1 Hit Point, and your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Wounded] condition increases by 1. You also become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Quickened] for 1 round and can use the extra action to Stride toward or make a Strike against the triggering creature.
